creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #4)
> AFAIU UTF-8 is allowed in the commit logs.
Right, I guess there are no formal restrictions, but several developers and even some of our users still prefer 8-bit encodings (e.g. bug #270509 comment #49); forcing UTF-8 on them would be kind of impolite.
